meta.title: Reprint Push Local Edited
meta.description: Pulled local WordPress site after local changes.
meta.author: Reprint Push Lab

steps.code: <?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; wp_insert_post(array('post_title'=>'Shared base post','post_content'=>'Local edited content','post_status'=>'publish','post_author'=>1)); wp_insert_post(array('post_title'=>'Local-only draft','post_content'=>'Created locally after pull','post_status'=>'draft','post_author'=>1)); update_option('reprint_push_plugin_payload', array('owner'=>'forms','mode'=>'local-edited'));
